title: tofu-postgres — PostgreSQL host/config/service/HA provider
description: Native OpenTofu/Terraform provider managing PostgreSQL installed state, config files, service, and HA (streaming/repmgr/patroni) over SSH/CLI. Logical DB/role/grant CRUD is out of scope — composed from cyrilgdn/postgresql at the consumer layer.

phases.title: Scaffold & transport
phases.exit_criteria: Compiles, gofmt/vet/test clean; framework-free transport with table-tested pure helpers.

items.description: go.mod/go.sum (mirrored, no dep changes), main.go, Makefile, .gitignore, .githooks/pre-commit, LICENSE, SPDX headers.
internal/postgres/ssh.go — os/exec ssh, key/cert only, temp-file key_pem, transient retry.
Client{SSH}, RunFunc, Command, RunCommands — the hermetic test seam.
conf.d + pg_hba rendering/parsing, dpkg/pg_lsclusters parse, primary_conninfo, patroni.yml + repmgr.conf render, mode dispatch — all table-tested.

phases.title: Typed resources
phases.exit_criteria: Each resource: schema, CRUD, ImportState-to-0-diff, injected-exec unit tests.

items.description: apt install postgresql-<major> + hold; dpkg read-back.
postgresql.conf keys via conf.d drop-in + pg_hba block; manage-declared-only; reload/restart dispatch.
declarative HA topology record + validation (patroni requires dcs_reference).
per-node HA bring-up dispatched on ha_mode; schema + skeleton CRUD + mode-dispatch tests.

phases.title: HA mode logic
phases.exit_criteria: All three modes render config + command sequences, unit-tested on pure logic.

items.description: primary wal_level/senders/slots; standby primary_conninfo + standby.signal + pg_basebackup bootstrap.
repmgr.conf, primary register / standby clone / repmgrd.

phases.title: Docs & examples
phases.exit_criteria: examples/ per resource + all HA modes; README, DESIGN, CLAUDE, .golangci.yml.

items.description: provider + one runnable HCL per resource, all three HA modes.
README (usage/resources/import/compose note), DESIGN (architecture + 3 HA modes + risk + verification-owed), CLAUDE, .golangci.yml.

phases.title: Live verification (owed)
phases.exit_criteria: Each resource + each HA mode proven end-to-end at 0-diff on a lab twin via the sanctioned pipeline, before any production use.

items.description: import-to-0-diff on a lab PG host through prod-netbox → prod-semaphore.
primary+standby streaming replication proven on lab twins; base-backup run detached.
repmgr register/clone/failover proven on lab twins.
patroni + DCS leadership proven on lab twins.
